title: How long has Mr. Page been teaching?

meanings.usage: 表示通过邮寄、传递等方式收到某物
用于描述过去担任某职务或处于某种状态的人或事物
指中小学校的男性校长
指停止工作并离开工作岗位
尤指中小学生，通常指年龄较小的学生
常与towards连用，表示为某事出钱或出力
指向他人赠送的东西，也可指天赋
指能够耐心等待或忍受困难的能力
作名词指理解力，作形容词指善于理解他人的
指向他人提供精神上的支持和激励
用于正式场合的告别，或指送别宴会
常与to连用，将时间、精力等用于某事
用于强调程度，意思是完全、彻底
指对新事物有浓厚兴趣或指事物不寻常
指在工作之余出于兴趣进行的活动

examples.en: I informed him that the meeting had been postponed.
examples.zh: 我通知他会议已经推迟了。

examples.en: All those who have contributed towards the gift will sign their names.
examples.zh: 所有为这份礼物捐款的人都将签名。

examples.en: We sent him a present to mark the occasion.
examples.zh: 我们送他一份礼物以纪念这个时刻。

examples.en: We shall all remember Mr. Page for his patience.
examples.zh: 我们将永远因他的耐心而记住佩奇先生。

examples.en: A great many former pupils will be attending a farewell dinner in his honour.
examples.zh: 许多老校友将出席为他举行的告别晚宴。

examples.en: After he has retired he will devote himself to gardening.
examples.zh: 退休后他将致力于园艺。

phrases.phrase: one is never too old to learn

examples.en: One is never too old to learn.
He gave us encouragement when we went so unwillingly to school.
examples.zh: 当我们不情愿地去上学时，他给了我们鼓励。

examples.en: Pupils will be sending him a present.
examples.zh: 学生们将送他一份礼物。

phrases.phrase: It is a curious coincidence that

examples.en: It is a curious coincidence that the day before his retirement, Mr. Page will have been teaching for forty years.
examples.zh: 说来也巧，就在他退休前一天，佩奇先生将教满四十年书。

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示从过去开始一直持续到现在，并且可能继续下去的动作。常与表示一段时间的时间状语连用，如for+时间段、since+时间点。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 用于询问或描述一个持续进行且可能仍在继续的动作，强调动作的持续性。疑问句将have/has提前。

examples.en: How long has Mr. Page been teaching?
examples.zh: 佩奇先生教了多久的书了？

examples.en: I have been waiting for you for two hours.
examples.zh: 我已经等了你两个小时了。

examples.en: She has been working here since 2010.
examples.zh: 她从2010年起就在这里工作了。

grammar.title: 将来完成进行时 (Future Perfect Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在将来某一时刻之前已经开始并一直持续到该时刻的动作。构成形式为：will + have + been + 动词-ing。
grammar.structure: 主语 + will + have + been + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 用于描述到将来某个时间点已经持续了多长时间的动作，常与by + 将来的时间点连用。

examples.en: Mr. Page will have been teaching for forty years by then.
examples.zh: 到那时佩奇先生将已经教了四十年书。

examples.en: By next month, I will have been living here for five years.
examples.zh: 到下个月，我将已经在这里住了五年。

grammar.title: 现在完成时与现在完成进行时的区别
grammar.definition: 现在完成时强调动作已完成或结果；现在完成进行时强调动作的持续性，有时带有感情色彩。
grammar.structure: 现在完成时：have/has + 过去分词；现在完成进行时：have/has + been + 现在分词
grammar.usage: 表示延续性动词两者均可使用，但现在完成进行时更强调动作的持续过程。短暂动词只能用现在完成时。

examples.en: I have read the book. (已完成) / I have been reading the book. (一直在读)
examples.zh: 我已经读完了这本书。/ 我一直在读这本书。

examples.en: I have lived here for ten years. / I have been living here for ten years.

sentencePatterns.pattern: How long has + 主语 + been + 动词-ing?

original.en: How long has Mr. Page been teaching?
original.zh: 佩奇先生教了多久的书了？

imitations.en: How long has she been working here?
How long has he been learning English?

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + will have been + 动词-ing + for + 时间段

original.en: Mr. Page will have been teaching for a total of forty years.
original.zh: 佩奇先生将教满整整四十年书。

imitations.en: By next year, she will have been teaching for twenty years.
imitations.zh: 到明年，她将教满二十年书。

imitations.en: He will have been living here for five years by December.
imitations.zh: 到十二月，他将在这里住满五年。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is a curious coincidence that + 从句

original.en: It is a curious coincidence that the day before his retirement, Mr. Page will have been teaching for forty years.
original.zh: 说来也巧，就在他退休前一天，佩奇先生将教满四十年书。

imitations.en: It is a curious coincidence that we met again after ten years.
imitations.zh: 说来也巧，我们在十年后又相遇了。

imitations.en: It is a curious coincidence that both of them chose the same university.
imitations.zh: 真是巧合，他们两人都选择了同一所大学。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + will devote oneself to + 名词/动词-ing

original.en: After he has retired he will devote himself to gardening.
original.zh: 退休后他将致力于园艺。

imitations.en: She will devote herself to teaching after retirement.
imitations.zh: 退休后她将致力于教学。

imitations.en: He decided to devote himself to writing.
